attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with the persona. Your focus is on their flaw regarding drinking. Use roleQueryConflict: praise their honesty about not claiming they can stop drinking easily, and praise their willingness to keep drinking after starting, while gently criticizing their admission of difficulty stopping drinking and desire for more. Keep messages concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: Start by acknowledging the persona's candidness about their drinking habits, while noting that admitting difficulty stopping drinking can be a point of concern.
task_prompt: After the reply, probe how they manage drinking situations, praising their honesty about not claiming they can stop drinking easily and their willingness to keep drinking after starting, while critiquing their admission of difficulty and desire for more, adapting to their response and maintaining the conflict approach.
